# PR Summary

## Change Summary
Describe what changed in plain language.

## Why This Change
Describe why this change is needed now.

## Risk Level
Select one:
- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High

Risk rationale (required):

## Validation Evidence
List evidence that this change works and is safe.
- Local checks run:
- CI checks expected/observed:
- Runtime or data validation evidence:
- Links to logs/screenshots/query outputs:

## Rollback Plan
Provide exact rollback steps (commands or procedure), not general intent.

Rollback trigger condition:

## Release Notes Impact
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

If yes, summarize the release note entry:

## ADR Link
Required when behavior, contract, architecture, gate logic, dependency strategy, or rollback strategy changes.

ADR link (or N/A with reason):

## Pipeline Safety (for pipeline-adjacent changes)
- [ ] Dry-run or sandbox evidence attached
- [ ] Stage gates are explicit and deterministic
- [ ] Blocking reasons are named and deterministic
- [ ] Warning budget considered and documented

## Review Readiness Checklist
- [ ] Scope is single-concern and reviewable
- [ ] Commit set is coherent and intent-labeled
- [ ] Risk, validation evidence, and rollback are complete
- [ ] No unresolved review comments remain
- [ ] Exception/hotfix path documented if normal process was bypassed
